title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 358.370 - Right to wind up
text:
358.370.  Right to wind up. — Unless otherwise agreed the partners who have not wrongfully dissolved the partnership or the legal representative of the last surviving partner, not bankrupt, has the right to wind up the partnership affairs; provided, however, that any partner, his legal representative or his assignee, upon cause shown, may obtain winding up by the court.
(L. 1949 p. 506 § 37) 
Accounting and settlement with deceased partner's estate, 473.220 to 473.230
